title: ceratonia oreothauma subsp. oreothauma
intro: Ceratonia oreothauma subsp. oreothauma, also known as carob tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae, characterized by its evergreen leaves and edible pods. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its pods containing mucilage, a gel-like substance that has been used to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of carob tree include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, aid in digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. Carob tree is often prepared as a tea, powder, or chocolate substitute, highlighting its versatility in traditional herbal preparations.
